sql: SELECT c.lead_wallet AS w, MAX(c.lead_tier) AS tier, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN c.net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS wr, ROUND(SUM(c.net_sol),3) AS net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN c.entry_ts>=unixepoch()-7*86400 THEN c.net_sol ELSE 0 END),3) AS net7d, ROUND(AVG(c.detection_lag_sec),2) AS lag, s.n_round_trips AS s_rt, ROUND(s.monthly_run_rate_sol,1) AS s_mrr, ROUND(s.win_rate,3) AS s_wr, ROUND(s.median_rt_pct,1) AS s_medrt, ROUND((unixepoch()-s.last_active)/86400.0,1) AS s_age_d FROM copy_trades c LEFT JOIN wallet_scores s ON s.address=c.lead_wallet WHERE c.strategy_id='copy-tp100-sl30' AND c.status='closed' AND c.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.lead_wallet HAVING n>=8 ORDER BY net DESC
